scripts.dev: pnpm i && concurrently -n apps,tunnel -c blue,green "pnpm --parallel --filter ./apps/* dev" "pnpm tunnel"
scripts.patch: git add . && git commit -m "Patch submit source code of app" && npm version patch && pnpm --filter ./apps/* run patch && git add . && git commit -m "Patch version of app" && git push && git push --tags
scripts.minor: git add . && git commit -m "Minor submit source code of app" && npm version minor && pnpm --filter ./apps/* run minor && git add . && git commit -m "Minor version of app" && git push && git push --tags
